parametrized_description: The summer camp uses A different types of beakers. Each beaker type i consumes E[i] units of flour and F[i] units of special liquid to produce G[i] units of slime and H[i] units of waste. The camp has B units of flour and C units of special liquid available. The total waste produced must not exceed D. The goal is to determine how many beakers of each type to use to maximize the total amount of slime produced.

G.description: Quantity of slime generated by every beaker

E.description: Quantity of flour utilized by each beaker

F.description: Quantity of unique fluid utilized by every beaker

H.description: Quantity of waste generated by each flask

a.description: The quantity of flour utilized by beaker i

constraints.description: The cumulative waste generated by all beakers is not more than D.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(quicksum(H[i] * a[i] for i in range(A)) <= D)

constraints.description: The cumulative quantity of flour utilized by every beaker is not more than B.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(quicksum(a[i] for i in range(A)) <= B)

constraints.description: The cumulative quantity of unique fluid utilized by every beaker is not more than C.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(quicksum(F[i] * a[i] for i in range(A)) <= C)

objective.description: The maximum quantity of slime is generated by all the beakers combined.

code.gurobipy: model.setObjective(quicksum(G[i] * a[i] for i in range(A)), GRB.MAXIMIZE)
